name: 2025 observations
description: Consolidated raw CGM data for 2025. Each day has its own annotation in the days[] array. Readings are deduplicated across source files. Times are UTC; timezoneOffsetMinutes applies at inspection time to convert to local.

days.notes: Times are UTC. High all afternoon (14-16), dinner spike to 18.2, slow overnight decline through 15.9 plateau to below-target by 03:00, overnight low 4.7-5.1, dawn spike to 19.3, morning insulin brings it down. A persistently high day — engine should stay mostly silent.
Times are UTC. Full 24h noon-to-noon. High afternoon (11-13), dinner drop to 5.9, overnight rise through dawn to 20+, morning insulin brings it down. Tests all zones.

Times are UTC. Post-lunch high (15), afternoon decline through target to 3.2 hypo at 20:30. Prolonged below-4.0 for ~60 min (19:50-20:40). Recovery to 7.2, then massive overcorrection spike to 15.6. Chaotic overnight. Morning decline back to target. Key test: engine should catch the afternoon descent early and suggest emergency foods as it accelerates towards hypo.

Times are UTC. Afternoon high (13-14) declining through evening to target range. Good evening 7-10 range. Overnight drop to 5.3, chaotic early morning oscillations 5-9. Late morning drop to 4.2 hypo then recovery. A day with both good and bad periods.
Times are UTC. Full 24h noon-to-noon. Volatile day — post-lunch spike to 15.6, drops to 6.7, dinner spike, wild overnight swings down to 2.9 hypo, chaotic dawn. Tests rapid changes and extreme lows.

Times are UTC. Post-lunch spike to 12.7, afternoon decline to 6.9 then recovery. Evening descent from 9.6 to 3.3 hypo at 21:50 — sustained below 4.0 for 80 min. Recovery, good overnight. Late morning rapid drop to 4.1 hypo at 12:00. Two separate daytime hypo events — the best test of emergency food suggestions and acceleration detection.

Times are UTC. Afternoon post-lunch spike to 12.8 then steady decline to 5.5, recovery, good evening 7-10 range. Post-dinner decline to 4.8 overnight. Sensor reads flat 4.9 from 04:00-07:30 (likely sensor compression low). Breakfast spike to 15.6 then steady high. Tests sensor artefacts and prolonged below-target.
Times are UTC. Full 24h noon-to-noon. Afternoon decline to 5.6, evening dinner rise and fall, overnight drop to 2.8 hypo, recovery, dawn spike to 18. Tests prolonged below-target periods.
